prompt: {"type":"quality comparison collage","subject":"whimsical fantasy anime illustration generated at three quality settings","style":"airy watercolor-and-ink storybook anime, soft pastel palette, detailed linework, painterly textures, bright magical atmosphere","canvas":{"background":"light gray overall background","aspect_ratio":"16:9 presentation slide"},"layout":{"sections":[{"title":"Low","position":"top-left","count":1,"labels":["Low"],"image":"a lively fantasy street scene with 1 youthful androgynous child mage in motion, smiling and raising a wand, surrounded by 4 large blue manta ray–like flying creatures, multiple orange-red goldfish, several round pufferfish, floating bubbles and confetti, with ornate European-style buildings in the background; the composition is busy and colorful but slightly less refined","overlay":"dark translucent rectangle near the right side with large white sans-serif text 'Low'"},{"title":"Medium","position":"top-right","count":1,"labels":["Medium"],"image":"the same prompt rendered again with 1 child mage positioned on the right side, face obscured by a peach square censor block, holding a staff upward, with 1 dominant large blue manta ray creature in the foreground, smaller blue fish-like creatures, orange-red fish, pufferfish, bubbles, and a pale fantasy city with towers and clock details in the background; cleaner spacing and more readable forms than the low version","overlay":"dark translucent rectangle near the lower-right with large white sans-serif text 'Medium'"},{"title":"High","position":"bottom-left","count":1,"labels":["High"],"image":"the same fantasy scene rendered with the highest polish: 1 cheerful child mage running forward with wand raised, wearing a flowing teal cape with warm pink-orange featherlike accents, cream tunic and bloomers, brown boots, and short fluffy pink hair; surrounded by 4 blue manta ray–like flying creatures, many orange-red fish, several tan pufferfish, bubbles and sparkles, in a sunlit ornate city street with stairs and elegant architecture; the image is crisp, balanced, richly detailed, and luminous","overlay":"dark translucent rectangle near the right-center with large white sans-serif text 'High'"},{"title":"GPT Image 2 Quality の比較","position":"bottom-right","count":1,"labels":["GPT Image 2","Quality","の比較"],"image":"text-only panel on a plain light gray background","typography":"large bold black sans-serif centered text over 3 lines reading '{argument name=\"headline text\" default=\"GPT Image 2 Quality の比較\"}'"}],"grid":"2 by 2 collage with 3 image panels and 1 text panel","margins":"thin gutters between panels"},"character":{"count":1,"description":"young fantasy child mage or adventurer, cheerful, dynamic pose, short fluffy {argument name=\"hair color\" default=\"pink\"} hair, ornate wand or staff, flowing teal-blue cape with coral and gold accents, cream outfit with puffed pants, whimsical storybook design"},"environment":{"setting":"sunlit fantastical European-inspired city street or plaza","floating_elements_count":"4 large manta ray creatures plus numerous small fish, several pufferfish, and many bubbles","mood":"playful, magical, celebratory"},"rendering_notes":{"comparison_purpose":"show visual differences among 3 quality levels using the same prompt","quality_labels_count":3,"text_panels_count":1}}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"质量对比拼图","subject":"在三种质量设置下生成的奇幻动漫插画","style":"轻盈的水彩墨水绘本动漫风格，柔和的粉彩调色板，细腻的线条，绘画质感，明亮的魔法氛围","canvas":{"background":"整体浅灰色背景","aspect_ratio":"16:9 演示 Slides"},"layout":{"sections":[{"title":"Low","position":"左上","count":1,"labels":["低"],"image":"一个生动的奇幻街道场景，画面中有 1 名年轻的中性化儿童法师正在移动，面带微笑并举起魔杖，周围环绕着 4 只巨大的蓝色蝠鲼状飞行生物、多条橙红色金鱼、几条圆形河豚、漂浮的气泡和五彩纸屑，背景是华丽的欧式建筑；构图繁忙且色彩丰富，但精致度略低","overlay":"右侧附近的深色半透明矩形，带有白色大号无衬线字体“Low”"},{"title":"Medium","position":"右上","count":1,"labels":["中"],"image":"同一提示词再次渲染，儿童法师位于右侧，脸部被桃色方形遮挡块遮住，向上举着法杖，前景中有一只占主导地位的大型蓝色蝠鲼生物，周围有较小的蓝色鱼类生物、橙红色鱼、河豚、气泡，背景是带有塔楼和时钟细节的苍白奇幻城市；相比低质量版本，间距更整洁，形态更易读","overlay":"右下角附近的深色半透明矩形，带有白色大号无衬线字体“Medium”"},{"title":"High","position":"左下","count":1,"labels":["高"],"image":"以最高精度渲染的同一奇幻场景：1 名快乐的儿童法师向前奔跑，举着魔杖，身穿带有温暖粉橙色羽毛装饰的飘逸青色斗篷、奶油色束腰外衣和灯笼裤、棕色靴子，留着蓬松的粉色短发；周围环绕着 4 只蓝色蝠鲼状飞行生物、许多橙红色鱼、几条棕褐色河豚、气泡和闪光，背景是阳光明媚、带有楼梯和优雅建筑的城市街道；图像清晰、平衡、细节丰富且明亮","overlay":"中右侧附近的深色半透明矩形，带有白色大号无衬线字体“High”"},{"title":"GPT Image 2 Quality 对比","position":"右下","count":1,"labels":["GPT Image 2","质量","对比"],"image":"纯浅灰色背景上的纯文本面板","typography":"居中的大型粗体黑色无衬线文本，分 3 行显示 '{argument name=\"headline text\" default=\"GPT Image 2 Quality 对比\"}'"}],"grid":"2x2 拼图，包含 3 个图像面板和 1 个文本面板","margins":"面板间细缝"},"character":{"count":1,"description":"年轻的奇幻儿童法师或冒险家，开朗，动态姿势，蓬松的 {argument name=\"hair color\" default=\"粉色\"} 短发，华丽的魔杖或法杖，带有珊瑚色和金色装饰的飘逸青蓝色斗篷，奶油色服装配灯笼裤，奇幻绘本设计"},"environment":{"setting":"阳光明媚的奇幻欧式街道或广场","floating_elements_count":"4 只大型蝠鲼生物，加上无数小鱼、几条河豚和许多气泡","mood":"俏皮、魔法、庆典"},"rendering_notes":{"comparison_purpose":"使用相同的提示词展示 3 种质量等级之间的视觉差异","quality_labels_count":3,"text_panels_count":1}}

breakdown.creativeCore: GPT Image 2 质量对比网格：一张四格对比图，展示了同一幅奇幻动漫场景在低、中、高三种质量设置下的效果，常用于演示图像生成质量的差异。
breakdown.subject: 空间
breakdown.text: 要求可读；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
breakdown.bestUse: 风格对比、产品系列、前后对照、角色变体

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 综合视觉 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, grid, 2x2]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime, fantasy, watercolor]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求可读；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
